zh.lifeSummary: 當Guyotte van Amstel IJsselstein於1314年出生在荷蘭武特雷特易瑟爾斯坦時，她的父親Arend van Amstel IJsselstein27歲，母親Maria d'Avesnes25歲。她於1330年5月20日與Jan I van Egmond在荷蘭武特雷特易瑟爾斯坦結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1377年在她的家鄉享年63歲，埋葬在荷蘭武特雷特易瑟爾斯坦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guyotte van Amstel IJsselstein于1314年出生在荷兰武特雷特易瑟爾斯坦时，她的父亲Arend van Amstel IJsselstein27岁，母亲Maria d'Avesnes25岁。她于1330年5月20日与Jan I van Egmond在荷兰武特雷特易瑟爾斯坦结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1377年在她的家乡享年63岁，埋葬在荷兰武特雷特易瑟爾斯坦。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Guyotte
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of American French   Goyette  .

variants.name: Goyette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Normand, Armand, Marcel, Aime, Emile, Philippe, Martial, Monique, Raoul, Alain, Alcide, Alexandre.

Americanized form of French Goguet: nickname for a cheerful or mocking person, derived from Old French gogue ‘joke, mockery’. Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t. Compare Guyett and Guyette .

en.lifeSummary: When Guyotte van Amstel IJsselstein was born in 1314, in IJsselstein, Utrecht, Netherlands, her father, Arend van Amstel IJsselstein, was 27 and her mother, Maria d'Avesnes, was 25. She married Jan I van Egmond on 20 May 1330, in IJsselstein, Utrecht, Netherlands. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 8 daughters. She died in 1377, in her hometown, at the age of 63, and was buried in IJsselstein, Utrecht, Netherlands.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guyotte van Amstel IJsselstein est née en 1314, à IJsselstein, Utrecht, Pays-Bas, son père, Arend van Amstel IJsselstein, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Maria d'Avesnes, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Jan I van Egmond le 20 mai 1330, à IJsselstein, Utrecht, Pays-Bas. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée en 1377, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterrée à IJsselstein, Utrecht, Pays-Bas.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guyotte van Amstel IJsselstein 1314 in IJsselstein, Utrecht, Niederlande geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Arend van Amstel IJsselstein 27 und ihre Mutter Maria d'Avesnes 25. Sie hat am 20. Mai 1330 in IJsselstein, Utrecht, Niederlande Jan I van Egmond geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb 1377 im Alter von 63 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in IJsselstein, Utrecht, Niederlande begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guyotte van Amstel IJsselstein è nata il nel 1314 nel IJsselstein, Utrecht, Paesi Bassi, sua padre, Arend van Amstel IJsselstein, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Maria d'Avesnes, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Jan I van Egmond il 20 maggio 1330, nel IJsselstein, Utrecht, Paesi Bassi. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 8 figlie. Morì nel 1377, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolta a IJsselstein, Utrecht, Paesi Bassi.

ja.lifeSummary: Guyotte van Amstel IJsselsteinが1314年にオランダウトレチトイジセルステインで生まれた時，父Arend van Amstel IJsselsteinは27歳，母Maria d'Avesnesは25歳であった。1330年5月20日にオランダウトレチトイジセルステインでJan I van Egmondと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1377年に故郷で63歳で死去し，オランダウトレチトイジセルステインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Guyotte van Amstel IJsselstein(이)가 1314년 네덜란드 우트레ch트 이j셀스타인에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Arend van Amstel IJsselstein(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maria d'Avesnes(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1330년 5월 20일 네덜란드 우트레ch트 이j셀스타인에서 Jan I van Egmond(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1377년 그녀의 고향에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 네덜란드 우트레ch트 이j셀스타인에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guyotte van Amstel IJsselstein nasceu em 1314, em IJsselstein, Utrecht, Países Baixos, seu pai, Arend van Amstel IJsselstein, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Maria d'Avesnes, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Jan I van Egmond em 20 de maio de 1330, em IJsselstein, Utrecht, Países Baixos. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1377, em sua cidade natal, com 63 anos, e foi sepultada em IJsselstein, Utrecht, Países Baixos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guyotte van Amstel IJsselstein родилась в 1314 г. в местности иджсселстин, утречт, Нидерланды, её отцу по имени Arend van Amstel IJsselstein было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Maria d'Avesnes, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jan I van Egmond 20 мая 1330 г. в местности иджсселстин, утречт, Нидерланды. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 8 дочерей. Она умерла в 1377 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 63 лет и была похоронена в местности иджсселстин, утречт, Нидерланды.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guyotte van Amstel IJsselstein nació en 1314, en IJsselstein, Utrecht, Países Bajos, su papá, Arend van Amstel IJsselstein, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Maria d'Avesnes, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Jan I van Egmond el 20 de mayo de 1330, en IJsselstein, Utrecht, Países Bajos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió en 1377, en su pueblo, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultada en IJsselstein, Utrecht, Países Bajos.
